meaning: n.青春期(一般指成年以前由13至15的发育期)
examples: No one knows for sure why adolescence is unique to humans.
The play is set in the dangerous no-man's land between youth and adolescence.
Some young people suddenly become self-conscious and tongue-tied in early adolescence.
D. program in developmental psychology at NYU and president of the Society for Research on Adolescence.
At another Rajasthan quarry, 15-year-old Raju has spent his adolescence among the piles of sandstone waste.
